title: KDataStore
content:
An extended data store with little configuration, easy encryption and extensive supported types.
Basic feature preview # view Your browser doesn't support embedded videos, but don't worry, you can download it and watch it with your favorite video player! compose TODO Setup # Get a sample or configure as below.
view groovy //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable 'NonConstantResourceId' tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += '-Xcontext-receivers' } dependencies { implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore:1.0.0' } //endregion kotlin //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable ("NonConstantResourceId") tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-util-view:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore:1.0.0") } //endregion compose groovy //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable 'NonConstantResourceId' tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += '-Xcontext-receivers' } dependencies { implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0' implementation 'io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore-compose:1.0.0' } //endregion kotlin //region KDataStore android.lintOptions.disable ("NonConstantResourceId") tasks.withType(org.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile).configureEach{ kotlinOptions.freeCompilerArgs += "-Xcontext-receivers" } dependencies { implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:kt-util:1.0.0") implementation ("io.github.shawxingkwok:android-kdatastore-compose:1.0.0") } //endregion Core Usage # Configure with extensive supported types # Collect or update KDataStore.Flow # That type Flow is declared inside class KDataStore and extends from the official Flow, being both collectable and mutable.
// update asyncly somewhere else Settings.bool.toss(true) Settings.bool.toss{ !it } // or suspend in a suspended environment Settings.bool.emit(true) Settings.bool.emit{ !it } Kotlin serialization # Usage # It’s a platform-neutral data conversion, and directly savable in my KDataStore.
import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable import pers.shawxingkwok.kdatastore.KDataStore @Serializable data class Data(val a: Int, val b: String) object MDataStore: KDataStore(){ val data by ktSerializable(Data(1, "")) } Config # Groovy plugins{ id 'org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization' version "$kt_version" } dependencies { implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.5.0' } Kotlin plugins{ id ("org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization") version ("$kt_version") } dependencies { implementation ("org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json:1.5.0") } Extended collection # Migration # Side action # Encryption #
